chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No. 256 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.1547/2024 21.11.2025 Mr. Azad Hussain, advocate holds brief for Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for respondent No.3 None present for the appellant. The matter is pending since 2024 without any significant progress. Even today, appellant is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Accordingly, the instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
